title: Install Defender for Identity Sensor on ADCS servers
remediation:
Go to the sensor page in Settings, you can view the already installed sensors in your environment and download the install package to deploy them on your remaining servers.
For more details, see Configure sensors for AD FS, AD CS, and Microsoft Entra Connect .
You will be scored as a percentage of your deployment progress.
remediationImpact: This change has no known impact on your users.
